theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Patients and rural users need warmth, calm, and trust. A clinical cold dark mode is intimidating. A warm, earthy palette with large, soft touch points reduces friction and builds trust. The design should prioritize absolute simplicity for users with limited digital literacy.

typography.primary_font: System (sans-serif). Standardized system fonts avoid font-loading lag and render Devanagari script (Hindi) optimally.

layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: MINIMUM 48px height and width for any interactive element. Ideal 56px to 64px for primary actions like Camera and Voice.

buttons.primary: Solid primary color (#2C6E49) with white text, min 56px height, rounded-xl for organic feel.
buttons.secondary: Outlined with subtle border (#E5EBE7), text primary, min 56px height.
buttons.floating_action: Massive 72x72 buttons for Voice and Camera input. Positioned prominently, not hidden. Use soft ambient shadows.

cards.ai_response: Surface white (#FFFFFF), radius 16px, subtle 1px border (#E5EBE7), generous internal padding (24px). DO NOT use heavy shadows. Left-align text for readability.
cards.red_flag_banner: Warning background (#FBEAE5) with bold Warning text (#D94A38), large warning icon 🚨. Fixed at top or highly visible inside the response.
cards.disclaimer_banner: Warm beige background (#F5F3E9), secondary text (#6B7A75). Reads 'Not a confirmed diagnosis. Please consult a doctor.'

inputs.text: 56px height, rounded 16px, subtle background (#F9F9F7), 1px border. Large font size (18px) to accommodate easy typing and Hindi script.

loaders.skeleton: Use subtle pulsing animations on rounded rectangles matching the anticipated AI response shape.
loaders.voice_recording: Concentric pulsing rings in Primary or Accent color to indicate listening.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Smooth standard React Native transitions (LayoutAnimation or Reanimated) for screen changes.
motion_and_interactions.haptics: Crucial. Add haptic feedback (expo-haptics) on Voice Record start/stop, Camera capture, and when a Red Flag is presented to the user.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio against backgrounds. Test both Hindi and English.
accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (Pressable, TouchableOpacity, TextInput) and key text MUST include a `testID` attribute. Convention: kebab-case. e.g., `testID='camera-input-button'`.

media_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react-native. Large (32px+), stroke-width 2 or 2.5 for clarity. Outline over filled.

image_urls.description: Close up of a large green leaf. Use as a soft header graphic or subtle background accent.
Lush green countryside. Can be used in subtle circular crop as a welcome image on the home screen.

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop the app using standard JavaScript files (.js, .jsx) as per project constraints. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx).
Install and use `lucide-react-native` for all icons.
Build a clean Home Screen focused purely on the 3 multi-modal inputs: A huge Camera Button, a huge Voice Record Button, and a Text Input field below them.
Implement the Gemini AI integration to accept text, image (`expo-image-picker`/`expo-camera`), or transcribed voice (`expo-av`).
Ensure the Hindi/English language toggle is extremely prominent, perhaps a floating chip or top-right header button (e.g., 'English / हिंदी'). State management should trigger instant UI translation.
On the Result Screen, render the AI response with generous line height. ALWAYS append the Medical Disclaimer UI at the bottom.
If the AI identifies serious symptoms, mount the Red-Flag Alert Component prominently above the response.
Use standard React Native StyleSheet for styling to keep things robust, utilizing the exact color codes and layout values defined in this JSON.
CRITICAL: Add `testID='some-element-name'` to every single interactive component and crucial text block.
